description: Base node for the epistemic mesh. Terminal defaults for all node-level queries. Any derived node may override any field.

model.rationale: Starting position: smaller model, higher signal-to-noise training data. Abliterated variant removes refusal training — shadow must hold positions without hedging. 4bit quantization for local inference. Second-order reasoning corpus may yield comparable performance to larger aggregate models. This is testable.

inference.note: Override in derived node for non-Apple-Silicon environments.

derive.note: Model reads this when scaffolding a derived node. Derived nodes extend with their own derive_instructions.md.
